rulings.Case Title: JOHN WONG VS. NICK LANHAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 11, 2016, Line 4. DEFENDANT NICK LANHAM, ED KOSTER, JENNIFER KOMM DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff fails to allege facts to support the causes of action against the moving defendants. The Court notes that opposition was filed 3 courts days late, i.e. 1 court day before the reply was due). The Court also notes that opposition to the demurrer tot eh Second Amended Complaint was also late. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CLAIRE HACKETT VS. CYRIL A. HACKETT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 11, 2016, Line 6. DEFENDANT CITY RANCH DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Cause of action for accounting is sufficiently alleged and is not uncertain. The Court does not rule on the argument raised by Plaintiff in opposition regarding defendants' representation as this is not a proper issue for demurrer. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOUSING RIGHTS COMMITTEE OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. VIC YANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 11, 2016, Line 7 ( Part 1 of 6). DEFENDANT VIC YANG DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Demurrer to the first cause of action is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for private nuisance to allege FACTS re: harm suffered by Plaintiff Uchida and the causal connection between the alleged wrongdoings and harm. Demurer to the cause of action for UCL violation is sustained without leave to amend. The Court gave Plaintiff an opportunity to amend the complaint to allege facts showing violations of Administrative Code as amended February 1, 2015. The FAC is devoid of any such facts. =(501/REQ)
